title: Vulkanified
description:
Vulcanifies your game! by Changing the Render from OpenGL to Vulkan
** Requires A gpu that supports Vulkan and/or is Released after the year 2017 **
body: It changes the in-game graphics api from **OpenGL** (**Open Graphics Library**) to **Vulkan** nearly doubling the performance than Vanilla Minecraft and and almost 1.35x more than sodium and it addons in most cases
